CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-01-01')), (2, toDateTime('2023-01-02')), (3, toDateTime('2023-02-28')), (4, toDateTime('2023-04-21')), (5, toDateTime('2023-04-23'));
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date) FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 2) FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 3) FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 0, 'UTC') FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(toDateTime('2023-04-01')) AS weekday FROM test_dates WHERE weekday = 7;
SELECT t1.id, t1.event_date, toDayOfWeek(t1.event_date) AS weekday FROM test_dates t1 JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE id < 4) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT toDayOfWeek('2022-12-31'), toDayOfWeek('2023-01-01') AS NewYear, toDayOfWeek('2023-04-01') AS AprilFools DAYOFWEEK, toDayOfWeek('2023-04-21', 2) AS CustomMode;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT toDateTime('2023-05-01') AS date; SELECT date, toDayOfWeek(date) FROM temp_dates;
